description.en: Add a followup instruction to an existing cloud agent. Provide additional tasks or modifications for the agent to execute.
description.de: Füge einer bestehenden Cloud-Agenten eine Nachfolge-Anweisung hinzu. Gib zusätzliche Aufgaben oder Änderungen für den Agenten zur Ausführung an.
description.es: Add a followup instruction to an existing cloud agent. Provide additional tasks or modifications for the agent to execute.
description.fr: Add a followup instruction to an existing cloud agent. Provide additional tasks or modifications for the agent to execute.
description.ro: Add a followup instruction to an existing cloud agent. Provide additional tasks or modifications for the agent to execute.
description.it: Add a followup instruction to an existing cloud agent. Provide additional tasks or modifications for the agent to execute.

vars.API_KEY: env:CURSOR_API_KEY|Get your API key from Cursor Dashboard at https://cursor.com/settings/api

description.en: Unique identifier for the cloud agent (e.g., 'bc_abc123').

description.it: Unique identifier for the cloud agent (e.g., 'bc_abc123').

description.en: The followup instruction for the agent to execute.
description.de: Die Nachfolge-Anweisung, die der Agent ausführen soll.
